title: EXP-369-baby-batch-3: prose polish — harmonics, section ref, heading, thesis softening + 4 OBE confirmations
target: 4 narrow prose patches across data/wins.json (WIN-009, WIN-047) and data/sections.json (part4, part9), plus 4 OBE confirmations (ISS-1675/1732/1716/2003)

patches.old_string: The robust first harmonic at ~14.3 Hz directly contradicts any resonance ceiling below that frequency. See WIN-008 for full analysis.
patches.new_string: The robust first harmonic at ~14.3 Hz directly contradicts any resonance ceiling below that frequency. Measured Schumann harmonics span 7.83, 14.3, 20.8, 27.3, and 33.8 Hz; all four harmonics above the fundamental fit within the spherical Earth–ionosphere cavity formula, and none corresponds to 11.7 Hz. See WIN-008 for full analysis.
patches.description: ISS-1993 carry-over (c3/c4): add quantitative harmonic list to WIN-009 detail_evidence for standalone readability. Lists all five measured Schumann harmonics and notes none matches 11.7 Hz.

patches.old_string: category-error import (MOND grouping): bounded firmament (~9,086 km) cannot accommodate galactic-scale referents the WIN cites as confirming evidence. See Part 6.13. [audit-trail only — not rendered]
patches.new_string: category-error import (MOND grouping): bounded firmament (~9,086 km) cannot accommodate galactic-scale referents the WIN cites as confirming evidence. See Part 6.14. [audit-trail only — not rendered]
patches.description: ISS-2002: WIN-047 sub_rationale references 'Part 6.13' but Part 6 goes 6.12 → 6.14 (no 6.13 exists). Confirmed: sections.json part6 headings show 6.12 then 6.14 (κ Coupling Cluster). Fix stale reference.

patches.old_string: Vindication note: the σ kept growing exactly as the Fisher arithmetic predicts
patches.new_string: Mechanical-prediction check: the σ kept growing exactly as the Fisher arithmetic predicts
patches.description: ISS-1730 (SEC-4.1 c5 H7): rename heading from 'Vindication note' to 'Mechanical-prediction check'. 'Vindication' can be read as celebrating a wrong prediction; the renamed heading describes the observation neutrally — that the growth was mechanically foreseeable from Fisher's √n scaling.

patches.old_string: None of the {{TOTAL_WINS}} claims demonstrate predictive power exceeding mainstream geophysical models.
patches.new_string: As of this review, none of the {{TOTAL_WINS}} claims demonstrate predictive power exceeding mainstream geophysical models.
patches.description: ISS-1660 (EXP-261 c2 H4): thesis sentence 'None of...' uses an absolute. Adding 'As of this review,' makes the scope explicit and avoids needing a full rewrite if a future WIN survives adversarial review. Low-risk prose hedge.

obe_resolution_details.evidence:
ISS-1675 reported a 'four-
sequence' rendering bug at the EXP-263 integration boundary in WIN-001 detail_evidence. Scanned all
sequences in the current wins.json WIN-001 detail_evidence: found 7 occurrences of

(normal paragraph separators), zero occurrences of 3+ consecutive
tags. The bug was apparently fixed by a prior integration. No patch needed.

ISS-1732 is a duplicate of ISS-1675 (same four-
bug, same WIN-001 evidence field, raised in a different curmudgeon cycle). Same OBE conclusion applies.

ISS-1716 reported the phrase 'replaced with a strawman' in the SEC-4.2.2 lead paragraph. Searched sections.json part4 section p4-422 for 'replaced with a strawman', 'strawman', and 'replaced': not found anywhere in the §4.2.2 content. The EXP-253 integration (or a later patch) already removed or never inserted that phrasing. No action needed.

ISS-2003 flagged WIN-047 finding text beginning with 'Framework' as potentially rendering oddly. Current finding: 'Framework-level contradiction (bounded firmament cannot accommodate galaxies whose redshift the dome adopts as confirmation)...' The 'Framework-level contradiction' label is a consistent categorization prefix used across the WIN registry; it reads as a descriptor, not a formatting artefact. No change needed.

tldr_evidence: Four prose patches verified against current data files: WIN-009 missing harmonic list added; WIN-047 stale 6.13 reference corrected to 6.14 (confirmed part6 goes 6.12→6.14); §4.1 heading neutralized from 'Vindication' to 'Mechanical-prediction check'; Part 9 thesis sentence hedged with 'As of this review.' Four OBE checks: ISS-1675/1732 (no multi-br found), ISS-1716 (strawman phrase absent), ISS-2003 (Framework label consistent).
tldr_verdict: 4 patches ready for decider integration; 4 ISSs confirmed OBE. All edits are narrow string replacements in existing fields.
